title: ERCOT DAM PTP Obligation Option 60 Day JSON API
description:
Day-ahead, hourly, point-to-point (PTP) obligation bids submitted by Non-Opt-In Entity (NOIE) or their Qualified Scheduling Entity (QSE) in ERCOT, which are linked to an owned Congestion Revenue Rights (CRR) option. 

DAM PTP Obligation Options are modeled as obligations but settle like an option in real-time.
